title: Erectile dysfunction documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

examination.text: Supports focused genitourinary, endocrine, vascular and neurological examination, blood pressure, heart rate, BMI or waist, glucose, HbA1c, lipids, morning testosterone and selected hormone context.
examination.rationale: Supports focused examination, cardiovascular observations and selected laboratory context for erectile dysfunction documentation; no decision is generated.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports focused genitourinary, endocrine, vascular and neurological examination, blood pressure, heart rate, BMI or waist, glucose, HbA1c, lipids, morning testosterone and selected hormone context.

source.title: EAU Guidelines on Sexual and Reproductive Health — Management of Erectile Dysfunction

exact_section.heading: Sections 5.4.2–5.4.3 — physical examination and laboratory testing

assessment.text: Supports clinician-documented cardiovascular, mood, anxiety, life-stressor, relationship and psychosexual context without calculating risk or assigning cause.
assessment.rationale: Supports cardiovascular, mood, anxiety and psychosexual context for erectile dysfunction documentation; no decision is generated.
assessment.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-documented cardiovascular, mood, anxiety, life-stressor, relationship and psychosexual context without calculating risk or assigning cause.

source.title: EAU Guidelines on Sexual and Reproductive Health — Management of Erectile Dysfunction

exact_section.heading: Sections 5.4.4 and 5.5.5 — cardiovascular and psychosocial assessment

treatment_and_management.text: Supports erectile-function onset, duration, rigidity, morning erections, desire, arousal, ejaculation, orgasm, relationship, treatment and symptom-impact documentation.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports erectile, sexual, relationship, treatment and impact history for erectile dysfunction documentation; no decision is generated.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports erectile-function onset, duration, rigidity, morning erections, desire, arousal, ejaculation, orgasm, relationship, treatment and symptom-impact documentation.

source.title: EAU Guidelines on Sexual and Reproductive Health — Management of Erectile Dysfunction

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Validated score, cause, cardiovascular risk conclusion, medicine contraindication, treatment selection, dose, device, hormonal interpretation, fertility context, referral and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, risk conclusion, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for erectile dysfunction documentation.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
